name: AD Mixtape · Sufferer’s Time :: Michael Crow At The Controls
description: Sun is shining. The latest installment in Michael Crow Taylor’s dank reggae mix series, Sufferer’s Time, winds a path through deep devotionals, primo dub and loping, cosmic love jams. Mixed at Dad’s Bar and Grill, Durham, NC. You can find Taylor onstage with Hiss Golden Messenger, and in the studio with Hiss, Revelators Sound System and many other friends ...

tracks.artist: Ras Michael & the Songs of Negus
